info.name: Axvero Frontend APIs
info.description: Frontend APIs for React. Home + catalog read routes are public (no System-Key). Auth login/signup/password routes are public. Logout, user, and confirm_code require Bearer token from login/signup.

request.description: FrontendCartController.index. Returns cart items grouped by shop. Requires Bearer token.
FrontendCartController.add. Variant is optional (e.g. 'Black-S'). Requires Bearer token.
FrontendCartController.updateQuantity. id = cart item ID, quantity = new desired quantity.
FrontendCartController.destroy. Set remove_cart_id variable to the cart item ID.
FrontendCartController.summary. Returns sub_total, tax, shipping_cost, discount, grand_total.
FrontendCartController.count. Returns number of active cart items.
FrontendAccountController.reOrder. Re-adds past order items to cart.
FrontendAccountController.notifications. Marks all unread as read.
FrontendCheckoutController.addresses. Returns all saved addresses for the authenticated user.
FrontendCheckoutController.createAddress. Creates a new shipping address.
FrontendCheckoutController.updateAddress. Updates an existing shipping address.
FrontendCheckoutController.deleteAddress. Deletes a shipping address by ID.
FrontendCheckoutController.setDefaultAddress. Sets an address as the default shipping address.
FrontendCheckoutController.setAddressInCart. Assigns a shipping address to all active cart items.
FrontendCheckoutController.deliveryInfo. Returns shops with carriers and pickup points per seller.
FrontendCheckoutController.setShipping. Sets shipping type per seller (home_delivery, pickup_point, carrier).
FrontendCheckoutController.shippingCost. Calculates and saves shipping costs for all cart items.
FrontendCheckoutController.placeOrder. Places the order. payment_type: cash_on_delivery, wallet, manual_payment, online.
FrontendCheckoutController.orders. Paginated order history with optional filter by payment_status or delivery_status.
FrontendCheckoutController.orderDetails. Returns full order details with items.
FrontendCheckoutController.cancelOrder. Cancels an order if it's in pending/unpaid status.
FlashDealController.products. Products for a flash deal by slug. Note: route param is {id} but controller treats it as slug.
FlashDealController.info. Single flash deal details by slug.
BrandController.index. Paginated brand list with optional name search.
BrandController.top. Cached list of top brands.
ProductController.getBrands. Flat list of all brands (no pagination).
ProductController.brand. Paginated products by brand slug.

query.description: product, brands, sellers, or empty for search history

request.description: SearchSuggestionController.getList. Returns suggestions by type (product/brands/sellers) and query_key.
ProductController.search. Paginated product search with filters (name, min, max, categories, brands, sort_key).
FrontendHomeController. Category from FRONTEND_HOME_MEN_SLUG or home_categories[0].
FrontendHomeController. Category from FRONTEND_HOME_WOMEN_SLUG or home_categories[1].
FrontendHomeController. Category from FRONTEND_HOME_DECOR_SLUG or home_categories[2].
FrontendHomeController. Category from FRONTEND_HOME_FOOTWEAR_SLUG or home_categories[3].
FrontendHomeController. Categories only (no products). Same payload as Categories Home.
Public legacy endpoint. Admin home_categories list. Optional query: category_id, slug, limit.
Public legacy endpoint. Paginated products for any category slug.
CategoryController.index. Paginated list of all categories.
CategoryController.info. Get category details by slug.
SubCategoryController.index. Get sub-categories by parent category ID.
ProductController.product_details. Get product details by slug and user_id.
FrontendAuthController. Email or phone in `email` field. On success, saves access_token to collection variable automatically.
FrontendAuthController. Sends verification code to email or phone. Also accepts `email_or_phone` and `send_code_by`.
FrontendAuthController. Reset password using code from forgot-password email/SMS.
AuthController. Restore session from stored token. No System-Key required.
AuthController. Google/Facebook/Apple/Twitter OAuth. Requires System-Key for mobile app clients.
AuthController. Requires Bearer token from login/signup.
AuthController. Returns authenticated user profile. Requires Bearer token.
AuthController. Verify account after signup when email verification is enabled.
AuthController. Resend signup verification code. Requires Bearer token.
